full_text:
Zhao Ji 趙基
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Ji (趙基)was born in Jincheng Commandery. Succeeded Wang Qian as Administrator of Dunhuang but could never be as good as him. Zhao Ji was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
